title: Billionaire Investor Says 'Sell Real Estate'
text: Billionaire Charlie Munger recently warned investors. He said that commercial real estate is facing severe challenges.

title: These 3 Dividend Stocks Can Add Some Sizzle to Your Passive Income This Summer

title: Kimco Realty Stock: Redeveloping A Core REIT Position
text: Kimco Realty Corporation is the largest U.S. publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, concentrated in the dense, high-income, first-ring suburbs of top markets. Regency Centers Corporation and Federal Realty Investment Trust are identified as ~ peer alternatives.

title: Kimco Realty: Grocery-Anchored Quality On Sale
text: Kimco Realty is a high quality REIT with very high exposure to grocery-anchored properties. It has material growth drivers in developing valuable land for mixed use centers.
